source_of_truth.note: Always verify against GitHub code, branch, commit, diff and tests. This file is a snapshot, not a source of truth. The current cleanup branch is based on a9a049b.

operational_north.plan: Plano Global v4.2 (incorpora Radar de Inteligência Institucional)
operational_north.current_mode: Saneamento da memória operacional para remover registros de outros projetos antes de retomar as demais frentes da auditoria geral.

recent_pull_requests.title: feat: busca reativa por useDeferredValue e melhorias visuais na dashboard
feat: implementa useTransition do React 19 e recuperação de senha real no Login.tsx
style: melhorias estéticas no Portal do Diretor e FAQ interativo

delivered_state.frente_fiscal_v1_acquisition: delivered in commit 02e198b; Frente Fiscal split-screen panel added under /fiscal with client-side XML DOMParser (NF-e/NFS-e), 44-digit key checksum (Modulo 11) validator with automatic CNPJ extraction, CSS laser scanning OCR sandbox simulator for PDFs/images, and transactional public.homologar_despesa_fiscal Supabase RPC with sandbox localStorage fallback.
delivered_state.relacao_bens_anexo_ii: delivered in commit e9fc22b; library generateRelacaoBens.ts added using ExcelJS to programmatically compile and style the official Bens Adquiridos list from capital despesas, complete with institutional headers and signatures, featuring reactive warning rows when no items exist.
delivered_state.portal_diretor_real_time_despesas: delivered in commit e9fc22b; Portal do Diretor got a real-time Notas Fiscais extrato listing audited invoices with dates, formatted CNPJ, values, and Custeio vs Capital badges. Mapped Anexo II to functional download button using ExcelJS dynamic code splitting.
delivered_state.gad_auditoria_estorno: delivered in commit 4345c37; added Despesas card inside /escolas/:id administrative panel allowing operators/admins to audit and reconcile despesas fiscais using the public.estornar_despesa_fiscal RPC with optimistic query invalidations.
delivered_state.security_center_panel: delivered in commit 87263bd; custom SecurityCenterPanel component added to /configuracoes containing an interactive RLS presentation, simulated Multi-Factor Authentication toggle and styled terminal-like audit examples. This component still requires a separate institutional truthfulness review.
delivered_state.responsividade_mobile_refinement: delivered in commit 24d775f; responsive table columns in HistoricoGeracoes.tsx and stackable document panels in PortalDiretor.tsx.
delivered_state.painel_visual_polish: delivered in PR #79; visual refinements across the executive panel.
delivered_state.admin_roles_ui: delivered in PR #75 (Marco 6B v0); /configuracoes user list and role management.
delivered_state.geracao_em_lote_163_demonstrativos: delivered in PR #73; generateDemonstrativosLote and batch processing control.

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data (Opção B)
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Remove the BASE sheet from generated individual workbooks if present
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
